name: @stacks/token-metadata-api-client
description: Client for the Stacks Token Metadata API
author: Stacks Labs

scripts.build: rimraf ./lib && npm run build:client --prefix .. && npm run build:node && npm run build:browser
scripts.build:browser: microbundle -i src/index.ts -o lib/index.umd.js --no-pkg-main -f umd --external none --globals none --no-compress --tsconfig tsconfig.browser.json --name TokenMetadataApiClient
